name: Caramel Snappers
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast pecan halves by spreading them in a single layer in a shallow baking pan. Toast in 350°F oven about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Line a baking sheet with foil; butter the foil.
2. On the prepared baking sheet, arrange the toasted pecans in groups of three, placing the flat side of each pecan down. Set aside.
3. In a heavy 1-quart saucepan, combine caramels and water. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the caramels are melted and smooth.
4. Remove the saucepan from heat. Drop about 1 teaspoon caramel mixture onto each group of pecans. Let stand for about 20 minutes or until firm.
5. In a small saucepan, heat the chocolate over low heat, stirring constantly until the chocolate is melted and smooth. Remove the saucepan from heat.
6. With a narrow metal spatula, spread a thin layer of chocolate over the top of each caramel center. Let stand until firm; remove the candy from the baking sheet. Store tightly covered.
